title: Settings and activity
passwordSecuritySubtitle: Reset your password and secure your account
archivedPostsSubtitle: View and restore posts hidden from your profile
archiveEmptySubtitle: Posts you archive will stay private and appear here.
archiveLoadError: Could not load your archived posts.
postRestoreError: Could not restore the post. Please try again.
privateAccountSubtitle: Only people you approve can follow you and see your posts
publicAccountDescription: Anyone will be able to follow you and see your public posts. Pending follow requests will be approved.
noFollowRequestsSubtitle: New requests to follow your private account will appear here.
showActivityStatusSubtitle: Allow people you message to see when you're online or were last active
activityStatusReciprocalHint: If you turn this off, you won't be able to see when other people are online or were last active.
blockedAccountsSubtitle: Review and unblock accounts you have blocked
noBlockedAccountsSubtitle: Accounts you block will appear here.
pushNotificationsSubtitle: Allow notifications when FindEat is closed
resetPasswordSubtitle: Receive a secure code by email
helpSupportSubtitle: Get help or report a problem
supportIntro: Send us the details and the FindEat support team will review your request.
supportMessagePlaceholder: Include any details that can help us understand the issue…
ticketSentHint: You can follow its status and see our reply below.
noSupportRequestsSubtitle: Requests you send will appear here.
supportLoadError: Could not load your support requests.
supportSubmitError: Could not send your request. Please try again.
deactivateAccountSubtitle: Temporarily hide your account and take a break
deactivateAccountBody: Your account will be hidden until you choose to reactivate it. Nothing will be permanently deleted.
deactivateHidden: Your profile, posts, reviews, and comments will not be visible to other people.
deactivateKeepsData: Your account information and content will remain safely stored.
deactivateReturn: To come back, log in with the same email and password and choose Reactivate account.
deactivateAccountError: Could not deactivate your account. Please check your password and try again.
preferDeactivationTitle: Would you rather take a break?
preferDeactivationBody: Deactivation hides your profile and content without deleting anything. You can return whenever you want.
deleteAccountWarningBody: Deleting your account is permanent. You will not be able to recover your profile or its content.
deletePostsReviews: Your posts and reviews will be permanently removed.
deleteSocialData: Follows, saved places, likes, notifications, and support requests will be removed.
deleteProfileMedia: Your profile details and uploaded profile media will be erased.
deleteRestaurantAccess: Restaurant ownership and management access will be removed.
deleteAccountFinalNotice: Your messages and comments will be anonymized so other conversations remain understandable.
deleteAccountError: Could not delete your account. Please check your password and try again.
termsOfUseSubtitle: Terms, privacy policy, and legal information
whatsNewPopupsSubtitle: Show a popup when new FindEat features and improvements are released. You can always view them on this page.
whatsNewPopupPreferenceError: Could not update this preference. Please try again.
noProductUpdatesSubtitle: New FindEat features and improvements will appear here.
appPermissionsIntro: Choose what FindEat can access on this phone. Some permissions can only be changed in your device settings after you make a choice.
permissionsSystemHint: Your phone controls these permissions. FindEat cannot enable a permission you have permanently denied or disable a permission on your behalf.

camera.title: Camera
camera.subtitle: Take photos for posts, reviews, and your profile.

photos.title: Photos and gallery
photos.subtitle: Choose photos for posts, reviews, dishes, and your profile.

location.title: Location
location.subtitle: Find nearby restaurants, calculate distance, and center the map.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Receive updates about messages, likes, comments, follows, and claims.
